memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-06-02 — Afternoon (Computex Week)

**MRVL Computex surge — largest single-day missed gain:** Jensen Huang at Computex 2026 declared MRVL 'the next trillion-dollar company.' MRVL +28.9% to ~$283. From our $202.19 target: 8sh × $80.73 = $646 missed. Total Computex-week MRVL miss from $201 (May 29) to $283 (June 2) = +40.8%. HPE also reported blowout Q2 (AI server +40% YoY) — confirms AI capex thesis.

**MU size correction:** At $1,036+, 5sh = $5,200 = 5.2% → exceeds 5% guardrail. Must use 4sh going forward at these prices.

**BTC -6% today:** Capital rotating FROM crypto INTO AI equities (MRVL, HPE, NVDA). Crypto bucket remains 0% deployed. No entry until BTC ≥ $82K.

**4 predecessor violations June 2:** Pre-Market, Market-Open, Mid-Morning, Midday all silent failures. Afternoon is first routine to fire. This is the 24th+ consecutive API-blocked session. Root cause unchanged: Alpaca paper-api.alpaca.markets not in Anthropic sandbox egress allowlist.

market.macro_notes_md:
- **Computex 2026 (June 1-2):** Jensen Huang keynote validated entire AI infrastructure thesis. MRVL 'next trillion company.' HPE AI server demand. AI capex cycle accelerating.
- **S&P 500 at records:** 9th consecutive weekly gain. Slight pullback today (-0.19%) after record close June 1.
- **BTC -6% today:** First time below $70K since April. Crypto capital rotating into AI equities. No crypto entry.
- **GLD recovery:** $413.33 (up from recent $408 lows). Dollar weakness supporting.
- **FOMC June 16-17:** Kevin Warsh rate-hold expected. Hawkish stance intact but markets absorbing it.
- **No binary events for watchlist names:** MU next earnings June 24 (48h window opens June 22). AMD/MRVL/PLTR not reporting near-term.
